texto: Holy intimacy is fostered with the marriage to two commitments: one to sitting in quiet solitude with the inner Self
autor: the other to sitting in rapt attention with one's mortal Beloved
explicacao: Citação de the other to sitting in rapt attention with one's mortal Beloved sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Holy intimacy is fostered with the marriage to two commitments: one to sitting in quiet solitude …” articula reflexao, mariah-mckenzie, intimacy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como casamento e reflexao.
